header.title: Letter of Recommendation for Masters/Doctorate Enrollment at PPGI/UFAM

form.confidential: We would like to have your opinion about the candidate who will apply to the Stricto Sensu Postgraduate Program in Informatics at this University. This information, which is CONFIDENTIAL, is necessary so that we can assess whether or not to accept the candidate as a student.

yourData.title: Your data
yourData.institutionDegreeLabel: Institution where the degree was obtained
yourData.institutionDegreePlaceholder: Enter the institution where you obtained the degree

relationshipWithCandidate.title: Relationship with the candidate
relationshipWithCandidate.roleWithCandidateLabel: Regarding the candidate, I was his/her
relationshipWithCandidate.knownSinceLabel: I have known him/her since the year

evaluationOfCandidate.title: Your rating of the candidate
evaluationOfCandidate.label: How do you rate the candidate on the attributes listed below
evaluationOfCandidate.knowledgeDomainLabel: Proficiency in his/her field of scientific knowledge
evaluationOfCandidate.comparisonLabel: Comparing this candidate with other students or professionals with similar education and experience levels that you have met in the last 2 years, please rate his/her ability to pursue advanced studies and research. The candidate is among (choose one of the options)

additionalInfo.title: Information
additionalInfo.description: We are particularly interested in your assessment of the candidate's potential for studies, research, and development in the field of Informatics. A detailed description of the positive and negative aspects of the candidate's performance in academic and/or professional activities will be more useful than generic comments. Comments on character, integrity, and motivation will be helpful if deemed relevant. The experience on which the evaluator's opinion is based should also be described. If possible, compare the candidate to other individuals with the same level of education/experience. The information is confidential.

filledLetter.title: Recommendation Letter Sent Sent Successfully!!!

Thank you for responding to the letter of recommendation requested from you.
The data provided will be analyzed and will be used in the candidate selection process.
